primary_colors: ocean blue, soft teal, seafoam, coastal blue, calm aqua
design_context.lighting_mood: bright natural daylight, large windows, airy open space, sunlit, fresh atmosphere
design_context.overall_description: Cool Ocean color palette. Bright & Airy atmosphere.

4dc81a43-5129-4f72-8df2-72414c397e33.generated_prompt: A high-end 3D interior visualization render of a 208-square-foot Bohemian bedroom, captured from a wide-angle diagonal corner perspective to reveal a meticulously planned spatial layout of "My Room." The scene is saturated with a cool ocean palette, featuring walls adorned in soft teal and seafoam lime-wash paint, contrasted by a feature wall in deep coastal blue. In the southwest corner, a Queen Bed—inspired by the sleek, mid-century wood frame from the reference—is layered with calm aqua linens, tasseled seafoam throws, and ocean blue velvet pillows. Centered against the north wall is a clean-lined wooden door, flanked in the northwest corner by a large, ornate arched floor mirror with a weathered brass frame. The eastern wall is a hub of functional design, featuring a central light-oak wardrobe with woven cane door inserts, while the northern half of the same wall holds a minimalist light wood desk and a matching chair with a textured macrame seat pad. A slim nightstand rests beside the bed, holding a ceramic lamp, while a low-profile dresser sits nearby to ground the space. The floor is a wide-plank white oak, partially covered by a large, plush circular rug in a muted sandy tone. Abundant natural light floods through unseen large windows, creating soft global illumination and crisp ambient occlusion shadows. Lush green plants in rattan planters are scattered strategically to enhance the airy, collected aesthetic. The render showcases clean geometry, high-resolution textile shaders, and volumetric sunlight that catches the dust motes in the fresh, bright atmosphere.
